items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:00-6:30 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Perform 5 x 800m intervals at a pace of 5:30 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Keep your heart rate in Zone 4 (160-175 bpm) during the intervals.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:00-7:30 min/km. Focus on keeping your heart rate below 140 bpm.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Complete a full-body strength training session focusing on core and leg exercises. Aim for 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise with 1-minute rest between sets.
